title: AI vs Jobs: Meta Considers Cutting Thousands of Roles to Fund AI Expansion
description: Meta is considering cutting thousands of jobs as it increases spending on artificial intelligence, reflecting a wider trend of tech layoffs linked to AI investments.

title: Short Interest in KraneShares Artificial Intelligence and Technology ETF (NASDAQ:AGIX) Expands By 101.4%

title: China’s OpenClaw AI sparks security warnings, startup hype
description: Major cloud platforms have added one-click setup services, and smartphone makers and startups have announced integrations or commercial forks.

title: Top Artificial Intelligence Stocks To Watch Now – March 12th

title: US pulls back proposed AI chip export rule as Trump team rethinks strategy
description: The U.S. Commerce Department has withdrawn a proposed rule that aimed to reshape global exports of advanced AI chips. The draft plan, part of the Trump administration’s AI strategy, would have tied chip exports to foreign investments and security guarantees.
